description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind CUDA CI that runs on push and pull request events to the development branch, specifically when changes are made to certain paths including cmake, amr-wind, submods, unit_tests, CMakeLists.txt, Dockerfile, and the workflow file itself. The workflow should use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository with submodules, prepare a CUDA environment, and then configure and build the project using cmake with CUDA support.
